_meta.purpose: Sentences that naturally carry local SEO value. The engine picks MAX 1 from here per review. These are NOT inserted as keywords — they are full natural sentences that happen to contain searchable terms.
rules: Must read like something a real patient would write
Never stuff two keywords in one sentence
Location should feel natural, not forced
The {{city}} and {{area}} placeholders are replaced by engine dynamically
Keep it conversational — nobody writes 'best homeopathic doctor in Lucknow' naturally unless it flows
